title: stacker-ai-workflows-v1alpha1
description: Canonical agent evaluation scenarios for AI-facing deployment workflows.

workflows.name: inspect-explain-plan-apply
workflows.goal: Safely inspect a deployment, explain topology, preview a change, and apply it with confirmation.

steps.purpose: Inspect health, drift, app inventory, and the latest command state.
Explain runtime compose and env paths without exposing secret values.
Preview the mutation and capture a stale-plan fingerprint.
Apply the previewed plan after explicit confirmation.

workflows.name: recover-with-rollback
workflows.goal: Read failure signals, preview a rollback, apply it, and confirm recovery.

steps.purpose: Confirm failing state or unexpected drift before rollback.
Read remediation hints and recent command failures.
Preview rollback_deploy with previous or explicit target version.
Apply the rollback after explicit confirmation.
